arts.ttl: Manchester United ready to ‘walk away’ from Osimhen deal
arts.sum: Manchester United are ready to ‘walk away’ from a proposed pursuit of Napoli forward Victor Osimhen. Osimhen is one of several strikers under consideration at Old Trafford as Ruben Amorim looks to sign a proven goalscorer this summer. arts.ttl: Serie A sides weighing up offers for misfiring Man United forward
arts.sum: Serie A clubs are monitoring Rasmus Hojlund situation’s at Manchester United ahead of the summer transfer window. Hojlund has endured a disappointing second season at Old Trafford, with the Denmark international having struggled for form. The 22-year-old has scored just three goals in the Premier League and only eight in 41 appearances across all competitions. arts.ttl: 20 G/A sensation given ridiculous asking price amid Man United transfer interest
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain wonderkid Desire Doue has recently been linked with Manchester United and would apparently cost absolutely crazy money. The talented young Frenchman has been in superb form recently, scoring a delightful solo goal for PSG in their Champions League victory over Aston Villa last night. That means Doue is now on a total of […] The post 20 G/A sensation given ridiculous asking price amid Man United transfer interest appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Amorim: Winning Europa League would be huge for Man Utd's future
arts.sum: While Man Utd have struggled in the Premier League this season, losing 13 matches, they are unbeaten in the Europa League, winning six games and drawing four, including a 5-2 aggregate victory over Real Sociedad in the last 16. But Amorim has warned his team that they now face a formidable opponent, with Lyon winning six of their last seven matches in all competitions, including a 7-1 aggregate triumph over Steaua Bucharest in the last round of the Europa League.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest told it’s €40m to buy player – Suggestion he fancies Manchester United move for prestige
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest target Douglas Luiz would have favoured a move to a club like Manchester United in the winter market, according to Corriere dello Sport. On March 22nd, we covered claims from Italy that Nottingham Forest will return for Luiz in the summer window, after failing to sign him in January. arts.ttl: ‘They want to make an example of me’ – Paulo Fonseca hits out at 9-month ban
arts.sum: Paulo Fonseca will be on the sidelines tonight as his Olympique Lyonnais host Manchester United in the first leg of their Europa League quarter-final. A rare occasion for the head…

arts.ttl: Rasmus Hojlund picks side as Roy Keane disagrees with Gary Neville in Man Utd debate
arts.sum: Manchester United’s only hopes of silverware this season rests on their upcoming Europa League clash with Lyon and striker Rasmus Hojlund has spoken out ahead of the game
